parsedJson.summary: The site has a functional layout but relies on a dated dark-grey aesthetic and a low-contrast hero image that obscures the brand's value proposition.

issues.title: Hero image is too dark and muddy
issues.what_observed: The main background image shows a worker on a roof but is heavily desaturated and darkened, making the scene look gloomy and the worker's face unrecognizable.
issues.why_problem: Visitors decide in seconds if a business is professional. A dark, muddy image feels 'cheap' or like a template from 2015. It fails to show the quality of the work or the professionalism of the staff.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: A bright, high-resolution photo of a clean, finished roof or a smiling worker in high-vis gear, with a subtle semi-transparent overlay so text pops without hiding the image.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Replace the current hero image with a bright, high-quality photo of a completed roof restoration. Apply a 10-20% dark overlay only to ensure text readability, keeping the image vibrant.
issues.plain_explanation: 主页背景图太暗、太灰，看起来像旧照片，让人看不清工人和屋顶的细节。
issues.customer_impact: 访客在 8 秒内就会判断网站是否专业。昏暗的图片会让访客觉得公司设备陈旧或不正规，导致他们直接关闭页面去找竞争对手。

issues.title: Quote form looks like a 'wall of text'
issues.what_observed: The 'Get Your Free Quote' form is a large, solid dark grey box with thin white borders. It dominates the right side of the screen and feels heavy and intimidating.
issues.why_problem: Large, dark blocks of color create visual friction. Users hesitate to fill out forms that look like 'work'. The dark grey background clashes with the white text, reducing readability.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: A clean, white or light-grey form with distinct, high-contrast input fields. The 'Send Message' button should be the most colorful element on the page.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Change the form background to white or very light grey. Add subtle drop shadows to input fields to make them look clickable. Ensure the 'Send' button uses the brand's bright teal color to stand out.
issues.plain_explanation: 右侧的报价表格是一个巨大的深灰色方块，看起来沉重且难以阅读，让人不想填写。
issues.customer_impact: 复杂的视觉设计会增加用户的心理负担。如果表格看起来很难填，访客可能会放弃询价，导致潜在客户流失。

issues.title: Top bar is visually noisy
issues.what_observed: The very top strip (above the logo) is a bright teal bar with white text listing '30+ Years', 'Warranty', etc. It competes for attention with the main navigation below it.
issues.why_problem: This creates 'banner blindness' or visual noise. The user's eye doesn't know where to look first—the top bar or the menu? It dilutes the focus on the primary call to action.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: Remove the top bar entirely or integrate those trust signals (Warranty, Experience) into the hero section as small icons/badges next to the headline.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Remove the teal top bar. Move the '30+ Years' and 'Warranty' text into the main hero section as small, clean icons with text to the left of the main headline.
issues.plain_explanation: 顶部的亮色条幅和下面的导航栏颜色太接近，导致页面顶部看起来很乱，分散了注意力。
issues.customer_impact: 视觉混乱会让访客感到困惑，不知道该看哪里。这降低了网站的专业感，可能让急需屋顶维修的访客失去耐心。

issues.title: Redundant CTA buttons
issues.what_observed: There is a 'Call Us Today' button in the top right, another one in the hero section, and a third one floating in the bottom right corner.
issues.why_problem: While CTAs are good, having three identical buttons on the screen at once creates visual clutter. The floating button in the corner is often ignored or accidentally clicked.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: One primary CTA in the hero section (e.g., 'Get Free Quote') and a sticky phone number in the header. Remove the floating corner button.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Keep the 'Call Us' button in the header. Make the hero button 'Get Free Quote'. Remove the floating button in the bottom right corner to clean up the interface.
issues.plain_explanation: 页面上到处都是相同的“联系我们”按钮，显得重复且杂乱。
issues.customer_impact: 过多的按钮会让页面显得廉价。访客可能会忽略所有按钮，或者因为找不到重点而离开。

positive_observations: The '30+ Years of Experience' and '20-Year Warranty' are strong trust signals that should be kept.
The form fields are clearly labeled (Name, Email, Suburb), which is good for usability.
The brand color (teal) is distinct and appropriate for a trade business.
redesign_priorities: 1. Replace the dark hero image with a bright, high-quality photo of a finished roof to build immediate trust.
2. Redesign the quote form to be light-colored and inviting, removing the heavy dark grey box.
3. Remove the top teal bar and integrate trust signals into the hero section to reduce visual noise.
